source.name: ICI Estimated ETF Net Issuance
source.note: Manual extract: Domestic equity row +16,271 millions USD (inflow), week ended 2026-07-01 from ICI release dated 2026-07-07. Same ICI table revises prior week ended 2026-06-24 domestic equity from previous artifact -4,807 to -3,732; production observation uses the latest week only (schema has no prior-week field).
